v1_s0545.text: And once they've learned that, they can manipulate these different concepts in quite complex ways without understanding there's a semantic meaning behind it.

v1_s0548.text: From the data being submitted by dog owners, Federico has found that many believe their dogs are using buttons to do more than just ask for things.

v1_s0550.speaker: SPEAKER_14
